title: v4.0 Final Evaluation -- EVAL4-01 primary A/B verdict
provenance_note: This is a consolidation report. Every quality number below is copied from an existing measured Phase 21 / diagnostic artifact under output/base21/ (same-harness, same-stack, taken 2026-07-14), with a `source_receipt` on every gating row. No new GPU eval was run for Phase 23; the single offline addition is the raw-base CI backfill (see comparability_audit.json), computed via the identical stratified bootstrap already used for every other arm.

judge_role.name: v4 relabel-SFT judge, s1 served / 3-seed capture ensemble

comparison_arms_status.gen_arm: Dual-candidate A/B per USER DIRECTIVE: raw base (candidate A) vs best trained ep1 (candidate B), both framed against the 0.4286 floor and v3.0 shipping gen. ep3 (shipped/promoted) and v4b (rebuilt-mix) carried as reference rows.
comparison_arms_status.judge_arm: v4 SFT judge (served s1 / 3-seed capture ensemble) vs v3.0 shipping judge figures, with the cross-base + engine-numerics-ceiling caveats.

candidate_A_raw_base.label: raw base (Qwen3.6-35B-A3B, no adapter)
candidate_A_raw_base.source_receipt_note: fresh_new_base_anchor block; CI backfilled offline, see comparability_audit.json

candidate_B_best_trained.label: ep1 (best trained gen variant)
candidate_B_best_trained.candidate_B_selection_rationale: ep1 is the best trained gen variant -- highest trained point estimate of {ep3 0.372, ep1 0.4381, v4b 0.4022}; exp1 confirmed ep3 overtraining (ep1 recovers 56% of the ep3->raw gap); exp4 confirmed the rebuilt-mix v4b (0.4022) lands below ep1.

v30_shipping_gen.note: both OLD base (Qwen3-30B-A3B); Phase 17 fresh full re-run figure is primary

gen_ab.gen_role_winner_rationale: raw base dominates every trained variant on BOTH point estimate (0.4897 > ep1 0.4381 > v4b 0.4022 > ep3 0.372) AND CI-lower (0.3812 > ep1 0.3295), exceeds the v3.0 shipping gen figure (0.4365), and the diagnostic's final verdict is that the v1.2 SFT-for-codegen recipe has NEGATIVE headroom on this stronger base (the model's raw coding ability exceeds anything the current corpus teaches). This gen-role-winner call is robust regardless of whether the raw-base CI-lower itself clears the floor, because it is a relative A/B and raw base wins both metrics.

capture_vs_capture.note: the rebase DID improve raw judge capability (+0.0084 capture), masked by the ~0.78-0.79 served engine-numerics ceiling common to both bases

pre_registered_verdict.milestone_primary_verdict: PRIMARY TARGET (judge rho > 0.85 single OR > 0.87 ensemble, CI-aware) NOT MET (served s1 ci_lower=0.7125; capture ensemble ci_lower=0.7563). Recorded as the valid, pre-registered failure disposition ("no_winner is a result"), not a forced pass.
